message:
Merge pull request #72 from kubestellar/add-kind-test-label

✨ Add kind/test label to default labels

files.patch:
@@ -33,7 +33,7 @@ presubmits:
               - -strict
 
     - name: pull-infra-prow-labelsync
-      cluster: prow
+      cluster: default
       labels:
         app: label-sync
       decorate: true

@@ -219,6 +219,12 @@ default:
       name: kind/support
       target: both
       addedBy: humans
+    - color: c7def8
+      description: Categorizes issue or PR as related to testing.
+      name: kind/test
+      target: both
+      prowPlugin: label
+      addedBy: anyone
     - color: 15dd18
       description: Indicates that a PR is ready to be merged.
       name: lgtm
